description: Weekly prediction market volume snapshots. Updated each RESEARCH scan.

snapshots.notes: NCAA March Madness driving sports surge (+32% WoW). Iran war geopolitics markets active ($464M+, 540+ markets). Polymarket fee expansion effective March 30.

snapshots.polymarket_notable: Record $500M+ on US-Iran war markets (Polymarket traders bet $529M on US-Iran war at peak)
snapshots.notes: Record geopolitics volume driven by Feb 28 US-Israel strikes on Iran.
January 2026 all-time high for monthly sector volume.
2026 projection of $40B represents 400% increase over 2024 levels.

trends.trajectory: Volume elevated since 2025 US election cycle. No sign of reversion. Geopolitics has replaced elections as primary driver in March 2026.
